design_note: consecutive-clique DMDGP: each point i>=3 pinned to its 3 predecessors -> propagating 2^(k-3) reflection tree
verdict: NO TRAP IN 3D (clique): two-stream failures occur but are restart-noise -- only 1/48 (2.1%) survive +32 restarts across independent streams, no population. The planar reflection-tree difficulty does not survive in 3D; a bit more restart budget always rescues it. Negative result; no construction claim.
